name: Fata Morgana

visual_attributes.morphology: complex superior mirage with multiple stacked images
visual_attributes.texture: smooth and fluid due to atmospheric distortion
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: varies greatly depending on the distance and size of the object being mirrored
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: images are layered vertically with both inverted and erect forms

domain_specific_visual.ATMOSPHERIC_CONDITIONS: requires a steep thermal inversion and atmospheric duct
domain_specific_visual.VIEWING_ANGLE: visible from any altitude within Earth's atmosphere

functional_attributes.primary_function: optical illusion caused by atmospheric conditions

relationships.description: Named after the sorceress from Arthurian legend

contextual_attributes.origin: Italian folklore, associated with Morgan le Fay
contextual_attributes.geographic_range: polar regions, deserts, seas, and lakes worldwide
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: linked to myths and legends, such as the Flying Dutchman

contrastive_constraints: NOT limited to a specific geographic location
